summary: Completed testing of 3 new features: 1) Delta sync spot expansion (1,355 total spots with Indonesia, Australia, Japan additions), 2) Notes reply notifications API, 3) Crew chat file sharing. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend loads and navigates properly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Spot database now has 1,355 spots. Delta sync added spots from Indonesia (79 total), Australia (68 total), Japan (35 total). Key new spots: G-Land (4 sections), Macaronis (Mentawai), Margaret River, Cactus Beach, Ichinomiya (Olympics venue), Hamaatsuma (Hokkaido). Notes notifications API working at /api/notes/notifications and /api/notes/notifications/mark-read. Crew chat file upload at /api/crew-chat/{booking_id}/upload-file supports PDF, DOC, XLS, PPT, TXT, CSV, ZIP up to 25MB.

spot_database_delta_sync.indonesia_spots: PASS - 79 spots (includes G-Land, Mentawai, Bali, Lombok, Sumbawa, Sumatra)
spot_database_delta_sync.australia_spots: PASS - 68 spots (includes Margaret River, Cactus Beach, Bells Beach, Snapper Rocks)
spot_database_delta_sync.japan_spots: PASS - 35 spots (includes Ichinomiya Olympics venue, Hokkaido, Miyazaki, Okinawa)
spot_database_delta_sync.gland_spots: PASS - G-Land Speedies, Money Trees, Launching Pad, Kongs
spot_database_delta_sync.margaret_river: PASS - Multiple Margaret River spots found

notes_reply_notifications.GET /api/notes/notifications: PASS - Returns notifications array with unread_count
notes_reply_notifications.notification_creation_on_reply: VERIFIED - Code creates Notification with type='note_reply' when replying to note (lines 355-374 in notes.py)

crew_chat_file_sharing.POST /api/crew-chat/{booking_id}/upload-: PASS - Endpoint exists, validates booking access
crew_chat_file_sharing.allowed_file_types: PASS - PDF, DOC/DOCX, XLS/XLSX, PPT/PPTX, TXT, CSV, ZIP, images
crew_chat_file_sharing.frontend_file_preview_modal: PASS - Shows file icon, name, size, caption input, Send File button
crew_chat_file_sharing.frontend_file_message_display: PASS - Shows file icon, name, size, download icon

crew_chat_quick_actions.GET /api/crew-chat/quick-actions: PASS - Returns 14 actions in 4 categories (status, conditions, logistics, vibes)
